title: Siro
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Siro |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[Shamunaar (frigate)|''Shamunaar'']], [[Both system]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' |species=[[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] **[[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Lieutenant Siro. I'm cutting all external communications. From this point on, any communications you make will actually be going to the sim program. If you get an override message from the fleet, it will be accompanied by a red blink that indicates I'm the real thing. Understood?''"
"''Yes, sir.|Admiral Matrick Klauskin and Lieutenant Siro|}} [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Siro''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who served the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] aboard the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Shamunaar (frigate)|''Shamunaar'']] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the ''Shamunaar'' was visited by [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]], who was being manipulated by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]]. Klauskin brought the frigate's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Biurk]], to the auxiliary [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] and placed Siro in charge of the main bridge. He then [[Death/Legends|murdered]] Biurk and opened all of the ''Shamunaar''{{'s}} external [[Airlock/Legends|hatches]]. Exposed to the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of outer [[Realspace/Legends|space]], Siro and the rest of the crew were killed. ==Biography== {{Quote|Lieutenant Siro! You have the bridge for a sim. The admiral and I will be running it from the auxiliary bridge.|Captain Biurk, to Lieutenant Siro|}} Siro was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] aboard the [[Shamunaar (frigate)|''Shamunaar'']], a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] that belonged to the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the ''Shamunaar'' was stationed in the [[Both system]] in order to prevent [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] forces from attacking a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] task force that had [[Blockade of Corellia|blockaded]] the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. The [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] were [[Second Galactic Civil War|revolting]] against the [[The galaxy/Legends|Galactic]] Alliance, and the Bothans had pledged their support to the insurrection. While the ''Shamunaar'' waited in the Both [[Star system/Legends|system]], Galactic Alliance [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]] arrived on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. Unbeknownst to the crew, he was being manipulated by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]], who had been fueling the war from its onset and had convinced the Admiral to betray the Galactic Alliance. Klauskin ordered the ''Shamunaar''{{'s}} [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Biurk]], to run a simulation involving a Bothan [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] attacking the ''Shamunaar'', and the Captain placed Siro in control of the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] as he and Klauskin left to run the simulation from the ship's auxiliary bridge. Klauskin promptly [[Death/Legends|killed]] Biurk and contacted Siro, informing the Gotal that the frigate's external communications had been disabled. Siro indicated receipt of the message, and the Admiral proceeded to [[Slicer/Legends|slice]] into the ship's main [[Computer/Legends|computer]] and open every external [[Airlock/Legends|hatch]], exposing Siro and the rest of the crew to outer [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and suffocating them. Klauskin sealed the auxiliary bridge and survived, however; he then turned the ''Shamunaar'' over to the Bothans. ==Personality and traits== Siro was a tall Gotal who served the Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet and unhesitatingly accepted an order given by Matric Klauskin, a superior [[Officer/Legends|officer]]. ==Behind the scenes== Siro was created by author [[Aaron Allston]] for his [[2007]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''. Siro appears briefly in the novel and dies shortly after being introduced. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Siro }} [[Category:Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet officers]] [[Category:Gotals]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]]
